name: FredOS Mainframe
description: Grants agents access to the FredOS L0-L4 canonical memory architecture.

projectMap.description: Optional agent-to-project mapping used by bridge hooks. Keys are OpenClaw agent ids, values are FredOS project ids.

fallbackProjectId.description: Optional FredOS project id used by bridge hooks when an agent id is not present in projectMap.

baseUrl.label: FredOS API URL
baseUrl.help: Where is the FredOS memory engine running?

projectMap.label: Agent Project Map
projectMap.help: Map OpenClaw agent ids to FredOS project ids for session bridge ingestion.

fallbackProjectId.label: Fallback Project ID
fallbackProjectId.help: Use this FredOS project when no explicit mapping exists.
